winner: I went to spray my pumpkin with pesticide, but then I realized—it was already a pumpkin *spray*!

candidates.text: I went to spray my pumpkin with pesticide, but then I realized—it was already a pumpkin *spray*!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative wordplay with 'pumpkin spray' as a pun, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: Why did the pumpkin bring a spray can to the party? Because it wanted to make sure there was no pie in the sky—just carved faces and a little Halloween fog!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke cleverly incorporates both 'spray' and 'pumpkin,' uses a playful twist on the phrase 'pie in the sky,' and ties in Halloween themes for specificity and surprise."}

candidates.text: I tried to make my garden look like a haunted house, but instead of a spooky pumpkin, I just ended up with a very confused gourd covered in hair spray.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, includes both required words ('spray' and 'pumpkin'), uses a surprising twist with 'confused gourd,' and delivers a light-hearted, humorous image."}

candidates.text: I tried to spray paint my pumpkin, but it turned out I was just giving it a facelift for Halloween — and apparently, it wanted to be a pressure washer.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "Creative twist with unexpected punchline, good use of required words, and concise humor."}

candidates.text: I tried to spray paint my pumpkin, but it turned out I was just pumpking around with the wrong tool.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke uses both required words naturally and includes a pun on 'pumpkin' and 'punking around,' which adds surprise and specificity. However, it could be more concise and impactful."}

candidates.text: What do you call a pumpkin that gets sprayed? A spray-gourd!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses the required words and plays on 'spray' and 'pumpkin' with a pun ('gourd'), but the humor is somewhat predictable and lacks deeper surprise or creativity."}

candidates.text: Why did the vegetable get kicked out of the party? Because it started to spray pumpkin.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses the required words but lacks a clear punchline and feels forced; the setup doesn't naturally lead to the 'spray pumpkin' conclusion."}

candidates.text: I tried to carve a pumpkin with a spray can, but it just ended up looking like it was sprayed by a pumpkin.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke uses both required words and has a basic play on words, but the humor is weak and the setup is confusing. The punchline lacks clarity and impact."}

candidates.text: I asked my gardener if he could help me protect my garden from intruders, and he just started to spray the pumpkin with a fire extinguisher.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "Includes required words, has a surprising twist, but the humor is somewhat weak and the scenario feels forced."}
